queries.question: What payment types are there for each movie streamed?
queries.sql: SELECT Payments.payment_type  from streamings_payments join streamings  ON Streamings_Payments.streaming_id = streamings.streaming_id join payments  ON Streamings_Payments.payment_id = payments.payment_id GROUP BY Streamings_Payments.payment_id HAVING COUNT(DISTINCT Streamings_Payments.streaming_id) = (SELECT COUNT(*) FROM  Streamings)

queries.question: What payment types are there for each movie streamed?
queries.sql: select streamings.streaming_id , payments.payment_type from streamings_payments join streamings  ON Streamings_Payments.streaming_id = streamings.streaming_id join payments  ON Streamings_Payments.payment_id = payments.payment_id
queries.sparql:
PREFIX : <http://ambrosia.example.org/streamingservice#>
PREFIX p: <http://ambrosia.example.org/streamingservice/prop#>
PREFIX xsd: <http://www.w3.org/2001/XMLSchema#>
SELECT ?streaming_id ?payment_type WHERE {
  ?streamings_payments a :Streamings_Payments .
  ?streamings a :Streamings .
  ?streamings_payments p:hasStreamings ?streamings .
  ?payments a :Payments .
  ?streamings_payments p:hasPayments ?payments .
  ?streamings p:streaming_id ?streaming_id .
  ?payments p:payment_type ?payment_type .
}
